headlines.title: Iran deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost
headlines.description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

headlines.title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
headlines.description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

headlines.title: Oil prices plunge on agreement to reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: Crude prices tumbled by as much as 15% on the conditional pause but is higher than before the war.

headlines.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile truce between the US and Iran
headlines.description: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

headlines.title: Watch: Iranians gather in Tehran following ceasefire announcement
headlines.description: Pro-government demonstrators poured onto the streets of the Iranian capital after the announcement of the two-week conditional ceasefire between the US and Iran.

headlines.title: UK house prices fall as Iran war uncertainty dampens demand
headlines.description: Mortgage rates have been rising and hundreds of the cheapest deals have disappeared over the last month.

headlines.title: Starmer to visit Middle East after US and Iran reach deal
headlines.description: The prime minister welcomes the deal, saying the UK will do "all we can to support and sustain this ceasefire".

headlines.title: Family of one-punch attack victim fear £500k compensation could run out
headlines.description: Craig Lewis-Williams needs specialist care for the rest of his life following the November 2021 attack.

headlines.title: Tributes after British teenager dies after road accident in Vietnam
headlines.description: Orla Wates is remembered by her mother as "beautiful, independent and very funny".

headlines.title: Forecast for UK to peak at 26C before temperatures plunge
headlines.description: Temperatures could nudge as high as 26C (79F) in some places on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Newlywed wife of US soldier freed by ICE after detention at military base
headlines.description: Annie Ramos, an undocumented immigrant who came to the US as a toddler, had gone to the base to complete paperwork so the couple could move in together.

headlines.title: Books changed my life, says Queen's first reading hero
headlines.description: Selina Brown, from Birmingham, says she is delighted to be the UK's first National Reading Hero.

headlines.title: He stalked me, but I was the one arrested
headlines.description: Jodie Morrow went to the police after being harassed, but later found herself in custody.

headlines.title: How 'world's best keeper' Raya helps Arsenal get back on track
headlines.description: David Raya is the best goalkeeper in the world, according to his Arsenal team-mates - and the Spaniard played a key role in his side's 1-0 win at Sporting.

headlines.title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
headlines.description: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?

headlines.title: Kanye West controversies - how did we get here?
headlines.description: West has a history of making antisemitic remarks and other controversial comments.

headlines.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson released after kidnap in Iraq, officials say
headlines.description: US officials say they are now "working to support her safe departure from Iraq".

headlines.title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
headlines.description: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.

headlines.title: Top Australian soldier charged with war crimes to remain in jail on remand
headlines.description: Ben Roberts-Smith faces five charges of the war crime of murder, which has a penalty of life in prison.

headlines.title: Almost a third of ferry fleet out of action on Scotland's west coast
headlines.description: CalMac's chief executive says an "unprecedented situation" has worsened, with 10 vessels currently unable to sail.

headlines.title: Arrest as £200k stolen from scouts trip fund
headlines.description: The money had been raised towards a scouts trip to Canada, leaving 100 children in the lurch.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
headlines.description: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

headlines.title: Katie Price banned from driving for seventh time
headlines.description: The former glamour model, from Brighton, has received bans totalling more than six years since 2010.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Frank Gardner on why Iran-US ceasefire is 'not the whole story'
headlines.description: Our security correspondent offers his analysis on the two-week ceasefire.

headlines.title: Relive the origins of Panem’s deadliest games
headlines.description: Due to a failed rebellion, a boy and a girl must fight in the annual Hunger Games.

headlines.title: Alexander-Arnold fails to ease Tuchel concerns as Kane stars
headlines.description: Thomas Tuchel's doubts about Trent Alexander-Arnold and reliance on Harry Kane are confirmed on the England manager's Madrid mission.

headlines.title: Seve's dance to Tiger's triumph - the art of a great golf photo
headlines.description: Some of golf's iconic images - from Seve Ballesteros' celebration to Rory McIlroy's roar and Tiger Woods' exhilaration - and the stories behind them.

headlines.title: I felt really alone after World Cup win - Kildunne
headlines.description: England full-back Ellie Kildunne admits feeling "really alone" after experiencing an emotional dip following their Rugby World Cup win.

headlines.title: McIlroy ready to enjoy the glorious freedom of being a Masters winner
headlines.description: Twelve months after the greatest moment of his career, Rory McIlroy returns to the Masters looking for a rare back-to-back win.

headlines.title: Legendary manager Lucescu dies days after resigning
headlines.description: Legendary manager Mircea Lucescu dies aged 80, five days after stepping down as Romania's head coach.

headlines.title: Garcia is good for boxing but a liability - Benn
headlines.description: Conor Benn believes WBC welterweight champion Ryan Garcia is "good for boxing" but says the American is a "liability".
